name: @vance/facelift-bridge
description: Vance Facelift — thin Capacitor wrapper around the deployed Vance web UI. Native account picker + brain URL switching; the live website handles auth and editors itself.

scripts.assets:regenerate-png: qlmanage -t -s 1024 -o assets assets/icon-source.svg && qlmanage -t -s 2732 -o assets assets/splash-source.svg && mv assets/icon-source.svg.png assets/icon-only.png && mv assets/splash-source.svg.png assets/splash.png && cp assets/splash.png assets/splash-dark.png
scripts.cap:add:ios: cap add ios || true; sed -i '' "s/platform :ios, '[0-9.]*'/platform :ios, '17.0'/" ios/App/Podfile && sed -i '' "s/IPHONEOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET = [0-9.]*;/IPHONEOS_DEPLOYMENT_TARGET = 17.0;/g" ios/App/App.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj && plutil -remove CFBundleURLTypes ios/App/App/Info.plist 2>/dev/null; plutil -insert CFBundleURLTypes -json '[{"CFBundleURLSchemes":["vance-facelift"]}]' ios/App/App/Info.plist && plutil -replace NSCameraUsageDescription -string "Vance uses the camera so you can attach photos to documents and chat messages." ios/App/App/Info.plist && plutil -replace NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription -string "Vance uses your photo library so you can attach pictures to documents and chat messages." ios/App/App/Info.plist && cd ios/App && pod install && cd ../.. && pnpm assets:generate
